title: Pan-Seared Fish Fillet with Caramelized Fries
description: A classic French dish featuring a delicate fish fillet paired with sweet caramelized fries.
instructions: Season the fish fillet with salt and pepper.
Heat a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat and add a small amount of vegetable oil.
Sear the fish fillet for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, heat vegetable oil in a separate pan to 350°F (175°C) for frying the fries.
Fry the fries in batches until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes per batch.
Drain the fries on paper towels and sprinkle with garlic powder.
Serve the fish fillet with caramelized fries and garnish with parsley and lemon wedges, if desired.
Offer caramelized onion jam on the side for an added flavor.
